Paddle launch & review updates

New paddle launches, price changes, market reaction, and reviewer-score notes inside the paddle section. Always verify price, legality, and review sources before buying.

View paddle updates
Paddle launches & reviewsJun 19, 2026

New paddle and review source policy

Paddle launch and review notes belong in the Paddles section. Picklary records price, product-page links, reviewer-score source links, and permission notes instead of inventing scores.

paddlesreviewsmarket reaction

Check before acting: Before buying, check product pages, approved-equipment lists, and original review sources.

Verify at source: Picklary reviewer score template
